title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that jointly understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery. The model reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 on various drug design tasks including toxicity prediction, drug repurposing, and antibody generation.
